title: narcissus neglectus subsp. bicchianus
intro: Narcissus neglectus subsp. bicchianus, also known as the Italian poeticus narcissus, is a subspecies of the daffodil plant that belongs to the Amaryllidaceae family. This plant contains alkaloids, including galantamine, which have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, including anticholinesterase and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Narcissus neglectus subsp. bicchianus include its potential to improve cognitive function, memory, and mood due to the presence of galantamine, which may help in the treatment of Alzheimer's disease and other neurodegenerative disorders. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve drying and powdering the bulbs, which can be used as a dietary supplement or in the form of capsules or tablets.
